pkgmetadata.longdescription: PicoForge is an open source commissioning tool for Pico FIDO security keys. It is a modern desktop application built with Rust and GPUI that provides an intuitive interface for reading device information, configuring USB VID/PID and product names, adjusting LED settings, managing security features such as secure boot and firmware locking, and viewing real-time system logs and diagnostics. PicoForge supports multiple hardware variants and vendors based on the pico-fido firmware.
PicoForge 是一款用于 Pico FIDO 安全密钥的开源调试与配置工具。它是一个基于 Rust 和 GPUI 构建的现代桌面应用程序,提供直观的界面用于读取设备信息、配置 USB VID/PID 与 产品名称、调整 LED 设置、管理安全启动与固件锁定等安全特性,并查看实时系统日志与 诊断信息。PicoForge 支持基于 pico-fido 固件的多种硬件型号和厂商。
